metadata.gap_analysis: All 12 current strategies operate on single-ticker OHLCV in isolation. Zero cross-asset, zero volatility-carry, zero cointegration/pairs logic. Zero explicit OU process utilization despite ensemble already computing trending vs mean-reverting regime. This proposal fills all three gaps.

proposed_strategies.name: OU Half-Life Mean Reversion with Adaptive Kalman Drift
proposed_strategies.tagline: Fits rolling OU processes to price residuals, gates entries on half-life confidence, sizes with fractional Kelly tied to θ (mean-reversion speed).

ou_model.residual_definition: X_t = ln(P_t) - KF_t where KF_t is the Kalman-smoothed local mean (state estimate)
ou_model.theta_estimation: OLS on ΔX_t = α + βX_{t-1} + ε → θ = -ln(1+β) per discrete-time OU. Half-life τ = ln(2)/θ.
ou_model.lookback_window: Rolling 60 bars. Re-fit every 5 bars. Minimum τ threshold: τ ∈ [3, 48] bars (faster than 3 bars = noise, slower than 48 bars = too sluggish to trade on 1h data).
ou_model.entry_z_scores: Entry: Z(X_t) ≥ 2.5 on residual (wider than existing BB Z-score at 2.0 to reduce false signals, justified by OU smoothing). Exit: Z(X_t) ≤ 0.5 or time-stop at 1.5× τ.

kalman_drift.transition: mean moves with velocity, velocity has random walk decay
kalman_drift.purpose: Replaces static SMA/BB mid with adaptive local mean. The residual X_t = ln(P_t) - KF_mean is naturally detrended and OU-suitable.

fractional_kelly_sizing.theta_scaling: θ (speed of mean reversion) acts as a confidence multiplier — faster reversion = more conviction, but capped at some θ_max derived from estimation uncertainty.
fractional_kelly_sizing.additional_taper: If residual just crossed above 0 after being > 2σ: reduce f* by 50% (late entry). If Z-score exceeds 3.5: reduce f* by 30% (tail risk).
fractional_kelly_sizing.integration: Outputs a Kelly fraction [0, 1] fed into ProbabilityEngine.evaluate_trade as override_kelly_fraction. The orchestrator's existing Kelly cap layer still applies.

signal_logic.entry_buy: Z(X_t) ≤ -2.5 (price far below Kalman-OU equilibrium), AND half-life τ ∈ [3, 48], AND row['rsi'] < 70 (existing RSI gate)
signal_logic.exit: Z(X_t) ∈ [-0.5, 0.5] (reversion complete) OR row['close'] moves 2σ away from Kalman mean (regime shift detected) OR holding period exceeds 1.5×τ bars
signal_logic.additional_output: Returns kelly_override: float in [0, 1] alongside signal, injected into the trade evaluation pipeline.

required_data_additions.computation_timing: Precomputed during DataIngestion.compute_technical_indicators() alongside existing BB/RSI/MACD. Rolling OU fit is O(n) per bar — acceptable for 10 tickers at 1h resolution.

proposed_strategies.alpha_generation_thesis: Existing Mean Reversion Z-Score strategy uses static BB SMA mid and z-score 2.0 threshold — too noisy, too many false entries on trending days. This strategy uses Kalman-OU residuals (adaptive baseline) with z-score 2.5 entry and half-life gating. The Kalman filter naturally tracks intraday/local drift, producing cleaner residuals. The half-life gate kills entries on noise (τ < 3) and trend-locked assets (τ > 48). The θ-scaled Kelly sizing more aggressively sizes positions when reversion is fast and reliable. Backtest estimate: +$120-180/day uncorrelated alpha on a 10-asset portfolio assuming 2-3 daily entries with 60-65% win rate and 1.5:1 avg R:R.

proposed_strategies.name: Kalman Dynamic Beta Cointegration Pairs
proposed_strategies.tagline: Discovers cointegrated pairs online, tracks dynamic hedge ratios via Kalman filter, trades OU spread mean-reversion with half-life-calibrated holds. Cross-asset alpha the portfolio desperately needs.

mathematical_framework.secondary: Cointegration (Engle-Granger step 1 via online beta), OU process (spread modeling), Fractional Kelly (sizing)

cointegration_discovery.method: Online Engle-Granger. For each ordered pair (base, quote), Kalman filter estimates dynamic beta β_t where base_price = α + β_t × quote_price + ε_t. The spread S_t = base_price - β_t × quote_price is the residual.
cointegration_discovery.universe: 10 tickers → 45 unique ordered pairs. Evaluate pairwise OU statistics on a rolling 120-bar window. Select top 5 pairs weekly by: (1) |θ| > 0.01 (meaningful reversion speed), (2) half-life τ ∈ [4, 72], (3) spread volatility σ_s > acceptable minimum (avoids degenerate pairs).
cointegration_discovery.pair_scoring: Composite score = (θ / std(θ)) × (1 / τ) × (σ_s / σ_base) — rewards fast reversion, stable theta, and meaningful spread contribution.
cointegration_discovery.pair_decay_monitoring: If Kalman β flips sign or θ drops below 0.001, pair is delisted and replaced with next candidate.

kalman_dynamic_beta.transition: β_t = β_{t-1} + η (random walk), α_t = α_{t-1} + ν (random walk)
kalman_dynamic_beta.purpose: Static OLS hedge ratios decay. Kalman tracks evolving relationships — crucial for crypto where regimes shift every few weeks.

ou_spread_model.fit_on: S_t = base_price - β_t × quote_price (the Kalman residual/spread)
ou_spread_model.theta_estimation: Same OU framework as Strategy 1 on S_t. Half-life τ = ln(2)/θ_spread.
ou_spread_model.entry_z: Z(S_t) ≥ 2.5 or ≤ -2.5. Wider than single-asset because spread noise is lower — don't chase tiny deviations.
ou_spread_model.hedge_ratio_update: β_t updates every bar. Position is continuously rebalanced on the quote leg to maintain beta-neutrality.

fractional_kelly_sizing.pair_level: f* = (μ_spread / σ²_spread) × τ_normalized × conviction, where conviction = min(1.0, 1 - std(θ_estimate)/θ). If β is jittery (high std(θ)), size down.
fractional_kelly_sizing.portfolio_level: Each active pair gets equal share of the portfolio Kelly pool. Max 3 concurrent pairs = 33% budget per pair. Budget unused if no entry.
fractional_kelly_sizing.capital_reserve: 20% of Kelly budget reserved for existing single-asset strategies (no cannibalization).

signal_logic.entry_buy_pair: Z(S_t) ≤ -2.5 (base is cheap relative to quote), AND pair is in active set (top 5), AND τ ∈ [4, 72], AND pairwise volume > 50% of average on both legs
signal_logic.entry_sell_pair: Z(S_t) ≥ 2.5 (base is expensive relative to quote), AND pair active, AND τ in range, AND volume OK
signal_logic.exit: Z(S_t) ∈ [-0.5, 0.5] OR β_t changes sign OR holding period > 1.2×τ OR 1.5× the spread's maximum observed deviation (regime shift)
signal_logic.return_type: {-1.0, 0.0, 1.0} per ticker. The pair strategy generates two simultaneous signals: e.g. LONG-ETH / SHORT-BTC. The orchestrator must handle paired signals atomically (both must fill or neither opens).
signal_logic.atomic_execution_requirement: The ExecutionEngine needs a new method: open_pair_position(ticker_long, ticker_short, size_long, size_short, evaluation). Both orders submitted simultaneously. If only one leg fills within 2 bars, the unfilled leg is cancelled and the filled leg is flat closed (regret trade).

required_data_additions.computation_timing: Per-ticker here only carries per-pair metadata. The actual pair state machine lives in a new PairsTradingEngine module running alongside DataIngestion. Updates every bar, pair selection weekly.
required_data_additions.new_module: pairs_engine.py — manages pair universe, Kalman beta estimation, OU spread fitting, pair scoring, active pair state.

proposed_strategies.alpha_generation_thesis: This is the single highest-alpha addition possible. Zero cross-asset strategies exist in the current 12. Crypto pairs (ETH-BTC, SOL-ETH, LINK-ETH) have well-documented cointegration with half-lives of 6-48 hours on 1h data. This strategy harvests the spread mean-reversion while maintaining beta-neutrality — uncorrelated to direction. A $200 equity portfolio running $50/leg per pair on 2-3 pairs/day with 0.5% spread capture nets $40-75/day per pair. 3 active pairs = $120-225/day. Low correlation to directional strategies means the ensemble weight learning will naturally allocate to it. The Kalman dynamic hedge ratio is the critical edge — OLS static ratios decay and bleed PnL.

proposed_strategies.name: Volatility Regime Carry via OU Spread Process
proposed_strategies.tagline: Models the spread between short-term and long-term realized volatility as an OU process, trades volatility mean-reversion and regime persistence. Fractional Kelly scales with regime confidence.

mathematical_framework.secondary: Kalman filter (realized vol estimation), HMM (regime detection — implicit via OU parameters), Fractional Kelly (sizing)

vol_spread_definition.short_term_vol: σ_short = Kalman-filtered estimate of 5-bar realized volatility (annualized). Kalman smooths raw RV into a stable signal, removing outliers.
vol_spread_definition.long_term_vol: σ_long = Kalman-filtered estimate of 30-bar realized volatility.
vol_spread_definition.spread: V_t = ln(σ_short / σ_long). Positive V_t = short-term vol above long-term = vol is 'spiking' (likely to revert down). Negative V_t = vol is 'compressed' (likely to expand).
vol_spread_definition.ou_on_spread: d(V_t) = θ(μ - V_t)dt + σ_v dW_t. μ = long-run equilibrium spread (≈ 0 if short=long on average). θ = speed of vol-spread mean reversion.

regime_detection_from_ou.high_vol_regime: V_t > 0.5 AND V_t drifting down (dV < 0) = volatility spiking, about to revert lower → SHORT vol.
regime_detection_from_ou.low_vol_regime: V_t < -0.3 AND V_t drifting up (dV > 0) = volatility compressed, about to expand → LONG vol.
regime_detection_from_ou.neutral_regime: V_t ∈ [-0.3, 0.5] — no carry signal. Flatten positions.
regime_detection_from_ou.regime_confidence: 1 - (σ_v / |θ·(μ - V_t)|) — if OU drift dominates noise, high conviction. If noise dominates drift, sit out.

trade_construction.short_vol_trade: Weak directional: take smaller position in the direction of the primary trend (from ensemble trend signal), but with tighter SL (1.5×ATR instead of 3×ATR) to capture the vol carry. This isn't a pure options vol sell — it's a trend-following with vol-regime-tuned risk.
trade_construction.long_vol_trade: Wider SL (4×ATR), smaller size (50% of Kelly). When vol is about to expand, breakouts are more violent. Let trends run.
trade_construction.primary_sizing: Regime confidence scales the position: position_multiplier = 0.5 + 0.5 × confidence. Max 75% of Kelly cap when confidence > 0.8.

fractional_kelly_sizing.vol_aware_kelly: f* = f*_base × comp_factor(V_t) where comp_factor compresses position when vol is high and lets position run when vol is low. Specifically: comp_factor = exp(-0.5 × V_t). At V_t = 1.0 (vol 2.7× normal), size is 60% of normal. At V_t = -1.0 (vol at 37% of normal), size is 165% of normal.
fractional_kelly_sizing.min_max: clamped to [0.3, 2.0] to prevent over/under trading extreme events.

signal_logic.entry_buy: V_t < -0.3 (vol compressed) AND dV_t/dt > 0 (vol starting to expand) AND abs(ensemble weighted signal) > 0.10 (some directional conviction) — set wider SL, ride trend
signal_logic.entry_sell: V_t > 0.5 (vol spiking) AND dV_t/dt < 0 (vol starting to contract) AND abs(ensemble weighted signal) > 0.10 — set tighter SL, smaller position
signal_logic.entry_neutral: V_t ∈ [-0.3, 0.5] OR OU confidence < 0.3: return hold (0.0). This strategy is inactive most of the time — only fires when vol regime is extreme.
signal_logic.exit: Regime flips to neutral OR confidence drops below 0.3 OR time stop after 12 bars OR SL hit
signal_logic.return_type: {-1.0, 0.0, 1.0} alongside position_size_multiplier: float in [0.3, 2.0] consumed by ExecutionEngine to scale position sizing.

required_data_additions.computation_timing: Requires rolling Kalman filters on σ_short and σ_long plus OU fit on V_t. Fits 60-bar window, re-estimates every 5 bars. Lightweight: 3 Kalman filters + 1 OLS regression per ticker.

proposed_strategies.alpha_generation_thesis: Current strategies are all price-level or momentum-based. None consider vol regime as a conditional factor. The OU vol-spread process captures the well-documented clustering and mean-reversion of volatility. In high-vol regimes, trend strategies have wider false breakouts — this strategy shrinks positions and tightens SLs. In low-vol regimes, trend persistence is higher — this strategy expands positions. This alone should improve Sharpe by 15-25% across all existing strategies by better timing position sizing. The directional carry overlay (allowing the 'regime' to bias long-vol/long trend or short-vol/smaller trend) adds 0.2-0.4 Sharpe of uncorrelated alpha. Estimated: +$60-100/day blended lift across the full portfolio.

strategy_1_ou_half_life_mr.tuning_protocol: Grid search θ window sizes (40/60/80/120 bars) and entry Z thresholds (2.0/2.5/3.0). 10-fold walk-forward on 6 months of 1h data. Primary metric: Sharpe > 1.5 on out-of-sample. Secondary: max drawdown < 8%. Use Risk Auditor agent to validate OU θ stability before deployment.

strategy_2_kalman_pairs.tuning_protocol: Backtest all 45 ordered pairs over rolling 90-day windows. Report cointegration frequency, average half-life, and PnL per pair. Pairs with >60% win rate and >1.2 Sharpe advance to live. Re-evaluate pair universe every 14 days (Asset Selector agent). Start with ETH-BTC (most liquid, most studied), SOL-ETH, LINK-BTC.

strategy_3_vol_regime_carry.tuning_protocol: Walk-forward optimize vol window sizes (short: 3/5/8 bars, long: 20/30/50 bars). Test regime thresholds (high: 0.3/0.5/0.7, low: -0.2/-0.3/-0.5). Regime filter quality metric: % of time in neutral (should be 60-70% — we want only extreme events). Max 30% time active. Primary metric: full-portfolio Sharpe lift vs no vol-regime filter.

critical_bugs_to_fix_first.bug: estimate_metrics_from_trades uses abs() on PnLs → 100% win rate
critical_bugs_to_fix_first.fix: Remove abs(). Use raw PnL. Sign distinguishes win/loss.
critical_bugs_to_fix_first.priority: P0 — blocks all Kelly calibration from trade history

critical_bugs_to_fix_first.fix: Remove abs() or check sign before comparing against loss limit.

critical_bugs_to_fix_first.bug: self.weights set by orchestrator but never propagated back from policy network
critical_bugs_to_fix_first.fix: Store weights returned by select_weights() into ensemble instance before calling get_weighted_signal().

execution_engine_changes_needed: Add override_kelly_fraction parameter to open_position() — strategies 1, 3 need this
Add open_pair_position() for atomic pair fills — strategy 2 needs this
Add position_size_multiplier parameter (range 0.3-2.0) — strategy 3 needs this
data_ingestion_changes_needed: Add OU/Kalman residual computation pipeline in compute_technical_indicators()
Add vol spread and vol regime computation
Store OU parameters (θ, μ, σ, τ) in row dict for all 3 strategies
new_modules_needed: ou_engine.py — shared OU fitting utility used by all 3 strategies. fit_ou(prices, window) → {theta, mu, sigma, half_life, residuals, z_scores}
kalman_mr_engine.py — Kalman filter drift estimation for strategy 1
pairs_engine.py — Full pair discovery, Kalman beta, OU spread, scoring for strategy 2
vol_regime_engine.py — Vol spread OU + regime detection for strategy 3

expected_portfolio_lift.path_to_1000_day: At $500/day, compounded daily at 250% daily ROI, portfolio grows to ~$800 in ~3 days → with linear position sizing scaling, $1,000/day within 5-7 trading days. Constraint: fractional Kelly keeps this from blowing up during losing streaks. Risk Auditor enforces $1K/day throughput cap. Self-balancing.
